title: Inspections
description: Create and manage local field inspections stored in IndexedDB.

newInspection.title: New inspection
newInspection.description: Create a local inspection linked to the active audit config.

placeholders.title: Retail visit / Warehouse zone / Equipment check

localInspections.title: Local inspections
localInspections.emptyDescription: Create the first inspection using the form above.

errors.loadConfig: Load an active config before creating an inspection.

readonly.archived: Inspection is archived. Data is read-only.
readonly.ready: Inspection is ready. Switch status back to Draft to edit checklists.
readonly.noPermission: For the current role, this form is read-only.

inspectionChecklist.title: Inspection checklist
inspectionChecklist.description: Form is built from config.inspectionForm and stored in inspection.attributes.
inspectionChecklist.empty: No inspection checklist configured for the active config.

photoChecklist.title: Photo checklist
photoChecklist.empty: No photo checklist configured for the active config.

photoGallery.title: Photo gallery
photoGallery.description: Import one or more photos from gallery and fill photo-level checklist fields.
photoGallery.noPhotoActions: No photo actions for the current role.
photoGallery.emptyDescription: Import photos from gallery to start field photo annotation.

errors.noFilesSelected: No files selected. On Android, make sure the photo is available on this device.
errors.selectImage: Select at least one image file.
errors.androidCloudOnly: On Android offline mode, cloud-only Google Photos items may not be available.
